text_block_list.text:
This is the start of Seiun Sky's second summer
camp.

Having arrived early to help out the academy
staff, I head over to meet her at the bus stop.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: For goodness' sake, Sky! Wake up this instant!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: King... Just carry me to the campsite, pleeease.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Absolutely not! Now stand up straight!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's nothing. More importantly, is she all
right?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
She was like this all the way here. There isn't a
speck of motivation to be found in her.

It's true that Sky can be sluggish, but working
hard while pretending she has no drive is her
whole deal.
choice_data_list: When it comes to training, she tries very hard.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Well, I'm pleased to hear that, but—

With a vague sense of unease, summer camp
begins...
